mapper.sql: id, user_id, unit_id, status, quiz_score, quiz_total, completed_at, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reading_progress (user_id, unit_id, status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{unitId}, #{status}) ON CONFLICT (user_id, unit_id) DO NOTHING

INSERT INTO reading_progress (user_id, unit_id, status, completed_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{unitId}, 'completed', NOW()) ON CONFLICT (user_id, unit_id) DO UPDATE SET status = 'completed', completed_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW()

INSERT INTO reading_progress (user_id, unit_id, status, quiz_score, quiz_total, completed_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{unitId}, #{status}, #{quizScore}, #{quizTotal}, CASE WHEN #{status} = 'completed' THEN NOW() ELSE NULL END) ON CONFLICT (user_id, unit_id) DO UPDATE SET status = EXCLUDED.status, quiz_score = EXCLUDED.quiz_score, quiz_total = EXCLUDED.quiz_total, completed_at = CASE WHEN EXCLUDED.status = 'completed' THEN NOW() ELSE reading_progress.completed_at END, updated_at = NOW()
